title: Adding data to iPlant/CyVerse Data Store
steps: If you have large amount of data and/or it exists on a remote server, you may find it easiest (and fastest) to use iCommands to 'iput' your data into your iPlant/CyVerse 'home' directory. a

Alternately, you can login to the Discovery Environment and choose the "Data" button on the left top open the Data window. From there you can find your username/home directory and choose the "Upload" button on the "Data" window's command bar. a
creator: Ken Youens-Clark
